questionHtml:
Which invertebrate phylum is characterized by a segmented body and bilateral symmetry?

A. Arthropoda

B. Mollusca

C. Porifera

D. Cnidaria

meta.title: Which invertebrate phylum is characterized by a segmented body and bilateral symmetry? A. Arthropoda B. Mollusca C. Porifera D. Cnidaria
